title: AutoTrainess: Teaching Language Models to Improve Language Models Autonomously
innovation_summary: AutoTrainess: Teaching Language Models to Improve Language Models Autonomously: We present AutoTrainess, a LM agent that exposes these operations as a repository of agent-computer interfaces for planning, data preparation, training, evaluation, and logging.
